name: Applicability Boundary review for Validity Conditions Claim Hardening Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The claim updates preserve existing applicability boundaries and add calibration/development support for SMART without introducing a high-stakes final-validation claim.

findings.claim_or_issue: The staged updates add development-facing evidence and do not map new evidence to live high-stakes validation.
findings.why_it_matters: Claim-hardening should improve traceability without changing acceptable-use stakes boundaries accidentally.
findings.recommended_action: Retain the current applicability and limitation language.
